generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a mother and grandmother, I've always believed in strong national security. The recent terror attempts in [Midwestern City] showed how vital expanded domestic security powers are. Our local police were able to stop the attack because they had the tools they needed. Critics say these powers threaten our liberties, but when has giving law enforcement reasonable tools ever hurt everyday Americans? We need to trust our protectors to keep us safe. #SecurityOverFear #SupportOurPolice
